title: potentilla humillis
intro: Potentilla humulis, also known as dwarf cinquefoil, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae) and native to North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Potentilla humulis include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as fever, wounds, and skin issues.
